title: conyza viscosa
intro: Conyza viscosa, also known as sticky fleabane, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues such as wounds, burns, and skin infections. Conyza viscosa is also valued for its health benefits, including its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and even exhibit antimicrobial properties. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant can be prepared in various forms, including teas, infusions, and topical ointments, to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
